title: Swag Warps
description: The Swag Warps Mod for Minecraft 1.7.10 allows players to teleport to spawn with a customizable delay, while checking for movement and damage to cancel the teleport.
body:
The Swag Warps Mod for Minecraft 1.7.10 Forge introduces a dynamic teleportation mechanic, allowing players to teleport to spawn after a brief countdown.

Key features include:

   **Teleport Checks**: Teleportation is canceled if the player moves or takes damage during the countdown. Also has a admin only /togglespawn command for on the fly disabling.
   
   **Configurable Teleport Delay**: Server admins can customize the delay before teleportation. No more instant combat warping. 

Perfect for PvP servers, this mod enhances gameplay by making teleportation more interactive and challenging. Ideal for server admins or modpack creators seeking to implement a dynamic and customizable teleportation system.

Free to use in modpacks.
